title: justicia calyculata
intro: Justicia calyculata, also known as 'Button Flower' or 'Kutaz', is a flowering plant species native to the tropical regions of Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The plant has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The herbal preparations of Justicia calyculata typically involve infusions, decoctions, or extracts of the leaves and flowers, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, or topical creams.
